rows.USen:
<unk[3:0:256]><unk[4:0:24 67 117 115 116 111 109 86 97 115 97 97 113]>Vasaaq!<unk[5:0]> Come and get some fruit—fresh
as it can be!

rows.TWzh: 真是的……
rows.JPja: ったく…

rows.CNzh:
<unk[3:0:2]><unk[4:0:6 83 97 100]>……唉，族长大人这么随性可真叫人为难，
我家还有待字闺中的女儿呢……
为了让她将来成为格鲁德族首屈一指的芭伊，
我费尽心思拉扯她长大，还让她去<Color=red>恋爱教室<Color=white>上课。
水果你想看多久都行，
可别老盯着我女儿看！
rows.TWzh:
<unk[3:0:2]><unk[4:0:6 83 97 100]>真是的……族長大人的玩笑話也是讓我滿困擾的。
畢竟我家孩子正值成長期……
為了讓我家孩子成為格魯德族第一的芭伊，
我讓他去<Color=red>戀愛教室<Color=white>上課，精心栽培他成長……
水果你要怎麼看都沒問題，
但是我家的孩子可不許你多看！
rows.JPja:
<unk[3:0:2]><unk[4:0:6 83 97 100]>…ったく <Ruby={6:14}ぞくちょうさま>族長様のお<Ruby={2:6}たわむ>戯れにも<Ruby={2:4}こま>困ったもんだよ 
ウチには<Ruby={4:8}としごろ>年頃の<Ruby={2:2}こ>子がいるってのにさ…
ウチの<Ruby={2:2}こ>子は ゲルド<Ruby={4:8}ぞくいち>族一のヴァーイになるべく
<Color=red><Ruby={8:18}れんあいきょうしつ>恋愛教室<Color=white>に<Ruby={2:4}かよ>通わせて <Ruby={4:6}てしお>手塩にかけて<Ruby={2:4}そだ>育ててるんだ
フルーツは いくらでも<Ruby={2:2}み>見ていいが
ウチの<Ruby={2:2}こ>子は あんまり<Ruby={2:2}み>見るんじゃないよ！

<unk[3:0:2]><unk[4:0:6 83 97 100]>...Ugh. I can't believe the chief is letting
you stay in the shelter. She must be
playing some kind of joke...

she'll be the best vai in Gerudo Town after
she finishes the "<Color=red>Voe and You<Color=white>"<Color=red> class<Color=white>.
You just worry about what fruit you're
going to buy, and don't even think
about distracting her!

rows.CNzh:
<unk[3:0:7]>是被誉为“爱之传道师”的那位瓦夏老师
开设的教室，教授恋爱的基础知识。
<unk[3:0:268]>地点就在<Color=red>女神像旁边的洞窟<Color=white>里，
可我还得看店，没时间去参观……
<unk[3:0:1]>不过，毕竟我家女儿缇克尔那么像我，
肯定是优秀学生嘛。
……
……
<unk[3:0:2]><unk[4:0:28 81 117 101 115 116 105 111 110 78 111 114 109 97 108]>我说你！可别去偷看啊！

專門教授戀愛的入門技巧。
<unk[3:0:268]>雖然他就在<Color=red>女神像旁的洞窟<Color=white>教課，
但是我有店要顧，所以沒辦法去參觀……
<unk[3:0:1]>不過我家的緹克爾
肯定像我一樣表現優秀。
……
……
<unk[3:0:2]><unk[4:0:28 81 117 101 115 116 105 111 110 78 111 114 109 97 108]>你可別去偷看喔！

<unk[3:0:7]>It's a class that Ashai teaches. It's for all
the young vai in Gerudo Town so they
can learn about voe.
<unk[3:0:268]>Class is held in a <Color=red>cave next to the
Goddess Statue<Color=white>, but I tend the shop and
can't walk my daughter, Dalia, there...
<unk[3:0:1]>She takes after me though—smart as
they come! She can handle walking to
and from class by herself.
...


<unk[3:0:2]><unk[4:0:28 81 117 101 115 116 105 111 110 78 111 114 109 97 108]>Hey!<unk[5:0]> Don't even think about following her
to the class! Understand?

你和族长大人一起消除了沙尘？

I hear you and the chief worked together
to clear the sand shroud? Is that right?

...I think I was being overly protective of
my daughter before.

influence on her. Perhaps even a
good one.
She's already learned a lot from Ashai's
"<Color=red>Voe and You<Color=white>" <Color=red>class<Color=white>. I bet she grows up
to be a brilliant beauty—like her mother.

<unk[3:0:1]>她继承了我的美貌，还十分认真地学习

the young vai in Gerudo Town so they
can learn about voe.
<unk[3:0:268]>Class is held <Color=red>underground<Color=white> in a <Color=red>cave near
the Goddess Statue<Color=white>, but I can't leave the
shop and walk my daughter, Dalia, there.
<unk[3:0:263]>She takes after me though—smart as
they come! She can handle walking to
and from class by herself.
